description_long: This is a rectangular, upright carton with a yellow background, featuring a playful illustration of a lion mascot wearing a cape on the front. The packaging is branded with the Faragello logo and displays both Arabic and English text, indicating it contains banana-flavored milk. The front and side panels highlight nutritional benefits such as calcium, vitamin D, iron, and zinc, and show a realistic image of a banana slice in milk. The back panel provides detailed nutrition facts, ingredients, and a QR code, while the sides include additional product information in Arabic. The carton is sealed at the top with a folded, glued closure, typical of single-use beverage cartons.
description: A yellow rectangular carton with a lion mascot and banana milk graphics, branded as Faragello. It features nutritional highlights, product information, and a sealed top closure.
description_view_0: This side view shows Arabic product information and ingredients, with a barcode at the bottom.
description_view_1: The front view displays the Faragello logo, a lion mascot, banana milk graphics, and prominent Arabic text.
description_view_2: The back view presents English product information, nutrition facts, a QR code, and recycling symbols.
description_view_3: This alternate front view shows the Faragello logo, lion mascot, banana milk graphics, and English product name with nutritional highlights.
